sessions.details: Andy Peebles session (rpt). Recorded: 1979-03-29. Available on Lovehunter, remastered reissue (EMI).

transcript.text: Hi there, I'm Tommy Vance and welcome to the Friday Rock Show. Two classic sessions tonight, recorded in 1968 and 1969 by Love Sculpture. And also we've got the latest one, which you're really going to like, by David Coverdale's White Snake.

We've got new releases by Tube Boy Army, No Dice, Dr. Feelgood and Patti Smith, and classic cuts from Barclay James Harvest, Rush, Billy Cobham, Deep Purple and many others. There's a Friday night connection to titillate your bits and maybe give you the chance to win a £10 record token.
But tonight we start with a monster, heavy rock, classic combination.
That was Deep Purple and Highway Star.
We played Deep Purple because loads of people have written in and said we ought to,
and we're glad that you did, and we have.
We played it for Michael White of Seven Oaks in Kent,
and also for Stephen Way of Hazelmere in Surrey,
Nick Peterken of Ottery St. Mary in Devon,
and Andy Payton of Osset in West Yorkshire.

in surrey ian mccowan of leamington spa andy white i think it is of the west wing of reading
